heading: Loans to Corporation from Reconstruction Finance Corporation authorized
label: 77jj Loans to Corporation from Reconstruction Finance Corporation authorized
text: The Reconstruction Finance Corporation is authorized to loan out of its funds not to exceed $75,000 for the use of the Corporation.
notes: Abolition of Reconstruction Finance CorporationSection 6(a) of Reorg. Plan No. 1 of 1957, eff. , 22 F.R. 4633, , set out as a note under , abolished the Reconstruction Finance Corporation.June 30, 195771 Stat. 647section 601 of this title
